activePathDecision: Keep WASI Preview 1 stdin/stdout JSON as the only v1.23 Match execution path.

componentModelWit.reason: WIT world shape, Zig support, Wasmtime host integration, typed caps, and compatibility migration remain future work.

directExports.reason: Memory ownership, allocation/free ABI, caps, and Rust/Zig glue parity require a dedicated future migration milestone.

rollback: Existing artifacts declare abiEnvelope=stdin-stdout-json and are rejected if metadata drifts.
